name: Nikosh Chhaya
overview: Bhaduri Moshai, the renowned occultist, is drawn into a haunting mystery when an Aghori tantric surfaces around the time of the blood moon, with sinister intentions which begin to harm people he holds dear.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Nikosh Chhaya (নিকষ ছায়া) | Chiranjeet C | Parambrata C | 31 OCT | hoichoi
